
=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 22   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 60   

Roughness: 10   

Hills: 10   

Chance: 0.01   

Music: Leaves   

Valid Player Spawn: True   

=== Structures ===
====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.48   

Log: Oak Log   

Top: Oak Top   

Height: 8   

Height Variation: 3   

ID: Simple Tree   

leaves: Oak Leaves   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Red   

Top: Fog/Red   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Red   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Green   

Top: Fog/Green   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Green   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Blue   

Top: Fog/Blue   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Blue   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Yellow   

Top: Fog/Yellow   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Yellow   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Cyan   

Top: Fog/Cyan   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Cyan   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.16   

Log: Fog/Magenta   

Top: Fog/Magenta   

Height: 0   

Height Variation: 0   

Priority: 0.1   

ID: Simple Tree   

leafRadius: 16   

leafRadius_variation: 3   

leaves: Fog/Magenta   

type: Round

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
